qEEG Analyzer.rationale: Already uses MNE-oriented ingestion, PyPREP/ICLabel/autoreject fallbacks, spectral parameterization, connectivity, source localization, longitudinal comparison, and RAG narrative hooks. Upgrade adds structured clinical summary, QC confidence, observed-vs-derived separation, method provenance, and machine-readable report JSON.
blockers_remaining: Prospective validation against site-specific qEEG normative data
Broader connectivity measures and reproducibility reports across devices
Patient-specific EEG-MRI source coregistration

MRI / fMRI Analyzer.rationale: Supports NIfTI/DICOM-oriented staged pipeline, structural/fMRI/DTI outputs, MRIQC wrapper, incidental-review triage, region metrics, targeting, and longitudinal change. Upgrade adds report-level clinical summary, confidence/readiness, limitations, modality warnings, and machine-readable JSON.
blockers_remaining: Production deployment of full MRIQC/ANTs/FastSurfer/SynthSeg dependencies
Validated age/sex normative volumetric percentile database
Routine radiologist QC adjudication loop

Risk Scores.rationale: qEEG similarity scores already include CIs and non-diagnostic posture; risk stratification uses validated assessments and evidence maps. Upgrade adds driver attribution, calibration cautions, and feature provenance to qEEG similarity outputs.
blockers_remaining: Clinic-specific calibration datasets
Dedicated tests for app-level risk stratification categories
External validation by condition and demographic subgroup

Digital Twin / Predictions.rationale: Engine is deterministic/demo-safe with uncertainty bands, evidence grades, and approval flags. Upgrade adds explicit simulation provenance, uncertainty methods, feature attribution style, and auditable assumptions.
blockers_remaining: Real patient feature-store integration for scenario inputs
Causal validation and calibration
Treatment-effect model governance

Decision-support Scores.rationale: Existing traffic-light and logistic risk layers are transparent but unevenly calibrated. Upgrade improves attribution/caution payloads and documents the validated-assessment anchoring direction.
blockers_remaining: Unified score schema across qEEG, PROMs, wearables, MRI, and adherence
Reliability diagrams and calibration monitoring

Report Generation.rationale: Reports already render HTML/PDF and include modality results and citations. Upgrade adds clinician review summaries, limitations, confidence, observed-vs-derived separation, and downstream JSON payloads.
blockers_remaining: Shared report block renderer across all analyzers
Export QA checks for every generated report

Evidence / Citation Layer.rationale: RAG and citation validation surfaces exist with evidence governance docs. Upgrade adds method provenance citations in qEEG summaries and benchmarked evidence-grading expectations.
blockers_remaining: Counter-evidence retrieval and evidence quality grading in every recommendation
Claim-level citation fidelity tests for generated reports

Multimodal Fusion Layer.rationale: Fusion is explicitly lightweight and uses persisted qEEG/MRI payloads. Upgrade adds modality agreement/disagreement, missing modality handling, uncertainty factors, and cautious recommendations.
blockers_remaining: Validated late-fusion model with calibration
Timeline-aware subject-level fusion
Patient-specific EEG-MRI source integration

Confidence / Uncertainty Layer.rationale: CIs, evidence grades, and confidence fields were present but scattered. Upgrade makes confidence/readiness structured in qEEG/MRI summaries, risk drivers, fusion uncertainty factors, and DeepTwin provenance.
blockers_remaining: Conformal prediction or calibrated uncertainty where trained models exist
Continuous monitoring of confidence-vs-outcome calibration

Explainability Layer.rationale: qEEG explainability and personalization snapshots exist. Upgrade adds explicit top contributing factors for qEEG similarity scores and interpretable modality agreement for fusion.
blockers_remaining: SHAP/GradCAM only for validated deployed models
Clinician-facing visual explanations for MRI model outputs

API / Serving Architecture.rationale: FastAPI routers, worker jobs, optional-heavy-dependency facades, and graceful failure are already strong. Upgrade extends response payloads without breaking existing fields.
blockers_remaining: Versioned schemas for all analyzer outputs
OpenAPI examples for new clinical summary blocks
Service-level observability for analyzer confidence and failures
